description: Synthetic 4-layer reflection-mode ODT phantom with BF+DF illumination. Based on rMS-FPT paper (Zhu et al., arXiv:2503.12246, 2025). 4 USAF-like pattern layers on a perfect mirror substrate, separated by 10um gaps. Background RI n0=1.54, pattern RI contrast dn=-0.07. Objective NA=0.28, wavelength=632nm. BF rings: NA=0.130 (8 angles), NA=0.251 (16 angles). DF rings: NA=0.420 (16 angles), NA=0.560 (16 angles). Total 56 illumination angles.
